summary: Log tab UI/UX redesign tested. Fixed critical layout bug (LOG button off-screen). All major features working including API data loading, RestTimerBar, session timer, QuickStatsStrip, exercise cards, logged sets with teal strikethrough, rest timer countdown. One remaining layout issue: History pill off-screen.

ui_bugs.issue: History pill partially off-screen (text at x=386, right=420, viewport=375px). The bottomRow effortSection (~200px) + actionPills (~170px) = ~370px exceeds 343px card body width. History pill is clipped/inaccessible by touch.

action_items: Fix History pill off-screen: bottomRow has effortSection (~200px) + actionPills (~170px) = ~370px exceeding 343px card body. Options: (1) reduce effortCircle size from 28px to 24px, (2) reduce gap from 5 to 3, (3) wrap pills to second line if needed, (4) move action pills to separate row below effort section
context_for_next_testing_agent: Log tab redesign is mostly working. Fixed SetRow layout overflow (TextInput flex:1 doesn't shrink in RN web, changed to explicit width:72/60px). Only remaining issue is History action pill is off-screen (x=386 > 375px viewport). LOG button tap flow: logs set, starts rest timer, shows session timer in header, updates QuickStatsStrip. All core features verified working.

features_verified.no_hardcoded_exercises: PASS - Shows SSB Squat, Block Pull, GHR, Ab Wheel from API (NOT Floor Press/Pendlay Row)
features_verified.rest_timer_bar_visible: PASS - Shows REST 1:30 in idle state with play button from page open
features_verified.rest_timer_starts_on_log: PASS - Counts down from 1:30 after logging a set
features_verified.session_timer_in_header: PASS - Shows 0:05 SESSION in top-right after first set logged
features_verified.quick_stats_strip: PASS - 3 pills: SETS, LB VOLUME, AVG RPE - updates live
features_verified.exercise_cards_collapsed: PASS - Shows name + prescription + Last ref + progress pill + chevron
features_verified.column_headers: PASS - TARGET | WEIGHT | REPS visible when expanded
features_verified.editable_inputs: PASS - Weight and reps TextInputs are editable
features_verified.active_set_gold_border: PASS - First unlogged set has gold border
features_verified.logged_set_teal_strikethrough: PASS - Logged sets show teal text with strikethrough
features_verified.effort_circles_6_10: PASS - Visible and tappable (via JS click confirmed)
features_verified.plus_set_pill: PASS - Adds new set row (confirmed via JS)
features_verified.notes_pill: PASS - Expands text input (confirmed via JS)
features_verified.finish_session_gate: PASS - Gray/disabled at <50% logged, becomes gold at >=50%
features_verified.log_button_tappable: PASS after fix - Was completely off-screen at x=543, fixed by setting explicit input widths (72px/60px) instead of flex:1
